items.title: IKSurfMag — The 2026 Kiteboarding Gear Guide is out
items.snippet: Check out the latest kites, boards and accessories for the 2026 season. We review the top 10 big-air kites on the market.

items.title: Wave 2 Pass A — The Lineup is live
items.snippet: The new News and Events section is now operational. Real headlines will be pulled from IKSurfMag, Windsurf Magazine and GKA shortly.
